prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2025年物理类最低位次约17471名，为近年基准位次；2025年物理类计划10人，2026年计划28 人，扩招180%，大幅增加招生名额将显著降低竞争激烈程度，推动位次数字大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中师范大学为211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年约第53名，近年排名 稳中有升（2021年46→2024年58→2026年53），学校层次稳固；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要涉及科研成果或重大荣誉（81岁博士毕业），无负面舆情；抖音热度 一般（排名第89位），短视频曝光量中等，未出现显著报考关注升温信号；历史无投档断档记录；教育学A+（王牌）、中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思 主义理论A-，5个A-及以上学科，教育学为全国顶尖水平，对师范类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度较高（推荐/高热 推荐），师范/教育类分化观望；贵州省2026年考生总数约299,000人，较2025年（297,258人）基本持平，竞争总量变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅扩招180%这一最关键因素，位次数字将显著后移；但学校声誉偏正面、软科排名上升、考生总数基本持平，对位次后移有一定缓冲，预测2026年物理类最低位次约36310名，区间35810–36810名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rank and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum rank for Physics Category is approximately 17471, serving as the baseline rank for recent years; the 2025 Physics Category enrollment plan is 10 students, while the 2026 plan is 28 students, an increase of 180%. This significant expansion in enrollment will notably reduce competition intensity, pushing the rank number substantially backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years (46th in 2021 → 58th in 2024 → 53rd in 2026). The university's level is solid; the 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving scientific research achievements or major honors (a PhD graduate at age 81), with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average (ranked 89th), with moderate short video exposure, showing no significant signs of increased application attention; no history of admission gaps; it has A+ in Education (flagship), A- in Chinese History, A- in Psychology, A- in Political Science, and A- in Marxist Theory, with 5 A- or above disciplines. Education is at the national top level, strongly attracting normal university applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have high social popularity (recommended/highly recommended), while Normal/Education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (297,258), so the overall competition volume remains similar.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most critical factor of a 180% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the rank number will significantly shift backward; however, the university's positive reputation, rising Soft Science ranking, and basically unchanged total number of examinees will somewhat buffer the backward shift. It is predicted that the minimum rank for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 36310, with a range of 35810–36810.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Central China Normal University's Physics Category has significantly expanded enrollment, and the rank is expected to shift substantially backward. Candidates with ranks within 35800 can focus on applying for Tier 1 advantageous majors (Psychology, Education); those with ranks in the 35800–36800 range are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information); candidates with ranks above 36800 may consider Tier 3 majors as safety options.
